title: Many Ukrainian soldiers outraged over removal of defence minister, troops tell BBC
summary_full: Protests erupted in Ukraine on Thursday after Mykhailo Fedorov's removal - and now soldiers are also criticising the move.
summary_public: Protests erupted in Ukraine on Thursday after Mykhailo Fedorov's removal - and now soldiers are also criticising the move.
